reason: Verified that the QA-20260518-235334-vm1j agent can successfully use the GitHub tool to retrieve the authenticated user's GitHub username after granting account access permissions.
steps: Step 1: Navigate to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully with sidebar showing three agents (QA-20260518-235334-vm1j, QA-20260518-235332-r6jh, QA-20260518-235331-19k4)
Step 2: Find and click the "QA-20260518-235334-vm1j" agent in the sidebar — Agent page opened successfully with agent name displayed at the top
Step 3: Verify agent status is "running" or "idle" — Agent status confirmed as "idle" (shown in top right corner)
Step 4: Send message "Use the GitHub tool to check who I am. Tell me my GitHub username." — Message typed into input field and sent successfully; agent status changed to "working"
Step 5a: GitHub account access card appeared — Card displayed asking "Allow access to GitHub to look up your username?" with GitHub account listed as "connected 1 minute ago" and checked
Step 5b: Click "Allow Access (1)" button to grant GitHub access — GitHub account access granted; agent status changed back to "working"
Step 6a: Additional GitHub API permission request appeared — Dialog appeared asking "Allow get the authenticated user?" for GitHub API endpoint "GET /user"
Step 6b: Click "Allow Once" to grant API permission — Permission granted; agent continued processing
Step 7a: Wait for response (25 seconds) — Agent successfully retrieved GitHub user information
Step 7b: Verify response includes GitHub username — Response clearly states "Your GitHub username is yiw190." with all tool calls marked as completed (checkmarks visible)
Step 7c: Take screenshot of response — Screenshot captured showing the complete conversation with the GitHub username response visible
